summary: Tested TQS timeframe-aware weighting feature (iteration 66). All 28 tests passed. Fixed missing trade_style parameter in TQS API endpoint. STYLE_WEIGHTS correctly configured for 5 profiles with scalp prioritizing technicals (35%) and investment prioritizing fundamentals (40%).

style_weights_5_profiles.details: STYLE_WEIGHTS has all 5 profiles: move_2_move, trade_2_hold, a_plus, swing, investment

scalp_weights.details: move_2_move weights: Technical 35%, Setup 30%, Fundamental 5%, Context 20%, Execution 10%

investment_weights.details: investment weights: Fundamental 40%, Setup 15%, Technical 10%, Context 20%, Execution 15%

tqs_result_fields.details: TQSResult has trade_style, trade_timeframe, weights_used fields, all included in to_dict()

live_alert_tqs_fields.details: LiveAlert has tqs_score, tqs_grade, tqs_action, tqs_is_high_quality fields with correct defaults

enrich_alert_with_tqs.details: _enrich_alert_with_tqs async method exists in EnhancedBackgroundScanner, calculates TQS and flags high-quality (>=70) alerts

style_weight_explanation.details: get_style_weight_explanation returns timeframe, rationale, weights, weight_percentages for all 5 styles

api_trade_style_parameter.details: POST /api/tqs/score accepts trade_style parameter and returns correct timeframe-specific weights

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: ScoreRequest model missing trade_style parameter, endpoint not passing it to TQS engine
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added trade_style: Optional[str] = None to ScoreRequest model and passed to calculate_tqs()

critical_code_review_comments: STYLE_WEIGHTS correctly implements SMB-style timeframe-aware scoring
All weight profiles sum to exactly 100%
trade_style inference from setup_type works correctly via _infer_trade_style
Scanner alerts enriched with TQS via _enrich_alert_with_tqs method
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified TQS timeframe-aware weighting. 5 weight profiles (move_2_move, trade_2_hold, a_plus, swing, investment) correctly prioritize different pillars. Fixed TQS API endpoint to accept trade_style parameter. LiveAlert dataclass has all TQS integration fields. High-quality alerts (TQS>=70) flagged for UI highlighting.
